mapper.select: /* 마이페이지 목록 조회 */ SELECT U.USER_ID, U.USER_NM, U.EMAIL, U.PHONE, U.PROFILE_IMG_NM, U.PROFILE_IMG_PATH, U.ORG_ID, U.USE_YN, U.LAST_LOGIN_DT, U.PWD_CHG_DT, U.LOGIN_FAIL_CNT, U.ACCT_STATUS_CD, C.DESCRIPTION AS ACCT_STATUS_DESC FROM TB_USER U LEFT JOIN TB_CODE C ON U.ACCT_STATUS_CD = C.CODE_ID AND C.CODE_GRP_ID = 'CG000001' WHERE U.USER_ID = #{userId}
